## What's done

<!-- Briefly describe what changed -->

## Type of changes

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî dependencies, configs, routine tasks
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation
- [ ] `style` ‚Äî formatting, CSS, whitespace
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî refactoring without new features
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî performance improvement
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî tests
- [ ] `ci` ‚Äî CI/CD changes
- [ ] `revert` ‚Äî revert changes
- [ ] `content` ‚Äî texts / translations

## Branch naming

```
feat/...
fix/...
chore/...
docs/...
style/...
refactor/...
perf/...
test/...
ci/...
revert/...
content/...
```

## Checklist

**Required**

- [ ] `npm run build` ‚Äî build passes without errors
- [ ] `npm run type-check` ‚Äî no TypeScript errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` ‚Äî no ESLint errors
- [ ] `npm run lint:fix` ‚Äî all auto-fixes applied
- [ ] `npm run lint:css` ‚Äî no StyleLint errors
- [ ] `npm run format:check` ‚Äî no Prettier warnings

**Tests**

- [ ] `npm test` ‚Äî Jest unit tests pass
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` ‚Äî Jest with coverage passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` ‚Äî Playwright E2E passes (run `npx playwright install chromium` first if needed)

**UI / UX**

- [ ] Tested on desktop (1280px+)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (375px)
- [ ] Tested on small screen (220px)
- [ ] Tested dark theme
- [ ] Tested light theme
- [ ] Tested UA language
- [ ] Tested EN language
